description: Journal linking hypothesis, failure evidence, draft mutation, review decision, review-gated apply, rerun comparison, and result for the controlled gate-never-opens iteration.

entries.note: Gate never opens because the key trigger omits the door_open setFlag.
Key collected but door_open=false and exit_reached=false (reproduced deterministically).
Agent proposes restoring the door_open setFlag action; not auto-applied.
Applied through the review-gated handoff to the in-memory seed only.
exit_reached transitioned false -> true; controlled failure resolved.

boundary: Read-only journal of the iteration; links evidence to decisions without authorizing auto-apply, self-approval, or committed-source mutation.
